# PERF-79 negative: SetMaxOpenConns / SetMaxIdleConns configured
lang: go
file: PERF-079-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	_ "github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3"
)

func OpenDB() *sql.DB {
	db, _ := sql.Open("sqlite3", ":memory:")
	db.SetMaxOpenConns(25)
	db.SetMaxIdleConns(10)
	db.SetConnMaxLifetime(0)
	return db
}
